economic_ownership_map.label: Cash and working capital

source.locator: Balance sheet, cash and cash equivalents $54 thousand at March 31, 2026

low.label: Fraction of reported cash that survives G&A before any shell event
low.rationale: Cash is immaterial (~$0.0008/sh at face) and run-rate G&A (~$126K/quarter) can consume it before minority common realizes value; high case keeps half of face cash for sensitivity only.

source.locator: Balance sheet, cash and cash equivalents $54 thousand at March 31, 2026

base.label: Fraction of reported cash that survives G&A before any shell event
base.rationale: Cash is immaterial (~$0.0008/sh at face) and run-rate G&A (~$126K/quarter) can consume it before minority common realizes value; high case keeps half of face cash for sensitivity only.

source.locator: Balance sheet, cash and cash equivalents $54 thousand at March 31, 2026

high.label: Fraction of reported cash that survives G&A before any shell event
high.rationale: Cash is immaterial (~$0.0008/sh at face) and run-rate G&A (~$126K/quarter) can consume it before minority common realizes value; high case keeps half of face cash for sensitivity only.

source_lineage.locator: Balance sheet, cash and cash equivalents $54 thousand at March 31, 2026

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Q1 2026 IR press release; proof base 0.0/sh via net_asset_value@1.0 (TPHS/investor-documents/ir-tphs/3-31-26-TPHS-Financials-Press-Release-v5.14.26.pdf).
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Near-term cash only; no Trust claim (May 2025 transfer).
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Run-rate G&A can consume cash quickly.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Cash is exhausted by G&A before any shell transaction.

source.locator: Other income line $239 thousand for fiscal year ended December 31, 2025

low.label: Duration-adjusted capitalization multiple on IP licensing cash
low.rationale: Bear assumes licensing goes to zero; base capitalizes the small FY2025 trickle at a modest multiple; bull allows a higher multiple without modeling reinvestment.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Q1 2026 IR press release; proof base 0.01/sh via owner_cash_or_dividend_discount@1.0 (TPHS/investor-documents/ir-tphs/3-31-26-TPHS-Financials-Press-Release-v5.14.26.pdf).
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Modest capitalization of residual IP cash, not a reinvestment compounder.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: IP income goes to zero and no replacement revenue appears.

economic_ownership_map.label: Preserved NOL shell option (Steel-controlled)

source.locator: Net operating losses note: federal NOLs $329.9 million at March 31, 2026

low.label: Risked present value of NOL-shell utility to common (not face NOL)
low.rationale: Face NOL is an option input, not equity value. Base assigns ~$2.6M risked shell utility under Steel control with no disclosed transaction; high sensitivity only. Section 382 and absence of a plan cap realization.

low.label: Probability shell utility reaches common within horizon
low.rationale: Probability is embedded in the shell_utility_m judgment band; explicit factor kept at unity so the proof graph stays auditable.

source.locator: Net operating losses note: federal NOLs $329.9 million at March 31, 2026

base.label: Probability shell utility reaches common within horizon
base.rationale: Probability is embedded in the shell_utility_m judgment band; explicit factor kept at unity so the proof graph stays auditable.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Q1 2026 IR press release; proof base 0.04/sh via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0 (TPHS/investor-documents/ir-tphs/3-31-26-TPHS-Financials-Press-Release-v5.14.26.pdf).
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Risked option on shell utility; face NOL is not equity value.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Five-year horizon aligned with yield-curve scenarios.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assumes modest shell optionality (~40% scenario weight in dated payoff), not face NOL value.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Shell is funded by Steel note advances; no large equity raise modeled in base.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Section 382, control, and absence of a disclosed plan widen the range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Going-private / Form 15 / note foreclosure leaves minority common with near-zero residual, or Steel never uses the shell.

economic_ownership_map.label: Steel promissory note and equity deficit reserve
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Steel promissory note and equity deficit reserve

source.locator: Note payable to Steel Connect LLC $1.372 million at March 31, 2026

low.label: Senior claim and deficit reserve haircut on common
low.rationale: Secured Steel note (~$1.372M) ranks ahead of equity; base reserve is a partial haircut (~$0.649M) consistent with the $0.045 five-year dated payoff, not full foreclosure of the note in base.

low.label: Steel note and deficit reserve per share

source.locator: Note payable to Steel Connect LLC $1.372 million at March 31, 2026

base.label: Senior claim and deficit reserve haircut on common
base.rationale: Secured Steel note (~$1.372M) ranks ahead of equity; base reserve is a partial haircut (~$0.649M) consistent with the $0.045 five-year dated payoff, not full foreclosure of the note in base.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Q1 2026 IR press release; proof base -0.01/sh via net_asset_value@1.0 (TPHS/investor-documents/ir-tphs/3-31-26-TPHS-Financials-Press-Release-v5.14.26.pdf).
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Senior claim haircut on common; base payoff $0.045 already nets this risk judgmentally.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Secured claim sits ahead of equity.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Note conversion or foreclosure extinguishes common ahead of any shell payoff.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

falsifiers: Cash is exhausted by G&A before any shell transaction.
IP income goes to zero and no replacement revenue appears.

Note conversion or foreclosure extinguishes common ahead of any shell payoff.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
